hallucination.rationale: The content that was actually written (Chief Complaint and HPI) accurately reflects the transcript with no fabricated information. The rest of the note is unfilled template placeholders.

instruction_following.rationale: The note failed to follow key instructions: template bracketed/parenthetical instructions were left in the output verbatim instead of being replaced with content or 'Not documented'; sections that should have been omitted (per instructions) were left as raw template; the Assessment and Plan sections were not filled in despite clear transcript content.

completeness.rationale: While the HPI is well-captured, the note is missing the GERD diagnosis, omeprazole 20mg prescription with dosing instructions, all lifestyle modification counseling, the 6-week follow-up plan, and the expected timeline for improvement. These are key findings from the transcript.
missed_items: Omeprazole 20mg once daily on empty stomach 30 minutes before breakfast
Lifestyle modifications: reduce coffee, avoid trigger foods, no eating 2-3 hours before lying down, elevate head of bed
Counseling that improvement expected within a few days, full effect in 2 weeks

template_adherence.rationale: Template placeholders and instructions in brackets and parentheses were left verbatim throughout the note instead of being filled in or properly handled. Multiple sections (ROS, PMH, Medications, Allergies, Social History, Family History, Vitals, Physical Exam, Assessment, Plan) are raw template text.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note. GERD, omeprazole, and other entities were not marked with {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax.

duplication.rationale: The entire note is duplicated — the full content from Subjective through Plan appears twice in the output.
